title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[What's New]
- The Wall of Honor System: Celebrate your Heroes' achievements and unlock a brand-new progression path for fully upgraded SSR Heroes!
1. Access: Once a Hero reaches 10-Star, their Wall of Honor can be unlocked through the Hero Academy.
2. Core Progression: 10-Star Heroes are displayed by faction (Stalwart, Aeronaut, Rover, and Mariner). Spend Hero Fragments and Hero EXP to increase their Honor Level. Each Honor Level grants permanent Power bonuses.

[Optimizations & Fixes]
